name: E-10 rule deprecation lifecycle: --emit-audit appends a rule-migrated JSONL entry for compliance reconstruction
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/migrate-rule.sh" old-rule --to new-rule --emit-audit "$PWD/audit.jsonl" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'rule-migrated' audit.jsonl && grep -q 'old-rule' audit.jsonl && grep -q 'new-rule' audit.jsonl && echo audited 1>&2
